# Wednesday


# time | ## Content                    | ### with whom
------ | ----------------------------- |------------------------------------
11-13h | **Welcome and introduction**  | Plenary session, Prof Dr Rob Ruiter  13-15h | **Step 1: Needs assessment**  | Little groups

 


13-15H - Little groups  

* **Step 1: Logic model of the problem** (see book chapter 4).
